text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, July 21. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Planning a street block party soon. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the schedule covered. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Bedtime can be a challenge. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I've indexed the research notes. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: The lawn mower is having issues starting. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Having dinner with our friends tonight. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's a big step. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Meal planning saves so much time. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I've indexed the research notes. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
